name: alhazen-personal-assistant
description: An executive AI team of Alhazen skills sharing one TypeDB database (alh_personal): research analyst, strategic thought partner, communication expert, operational powerhouse, career graph, health coach, and a chief-of-staff capstone.

plugins.name: analyst
plugins.description: AI research analyst -- decision-framed research missions, multi-thread wisdom-of-the-crowd consensus, independent verification, and the three-question gate

plugins.name: advisor
plugins.description: Strategic thought partner -- a board of advisor personas that debate then converge, bias checks, scenario stress-tests, and a decision journal

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Communication expert -- voice profiles from your best writing, audience personas that review drafts, and dimension-scored feedback loops

plugins.name: ops
plugins.description: Operational powerhouse -- recurring briefs with a manual-before-automate rule, stakeholder CRM with undercurrents, meeting prep, commitments, monitors

plugins.name: career
plugins.description: Career graph -- people, collaborators, projects, and potential new positions, plus the opportunity pipeline, skill gaps, and learning plan (pivot of jobhunt)

plugins.name: coach
plugins.description: Personal health and fitness monitoring -- ingest HealthKit metrics, track goals, surface regressions, manage appointments

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: Capstone orchestrator -- read-only cross-view over the whole team: daily agenda, weekly review, and routing between skills
